# Lightfriend

> AI assistant for dumbphones. Access WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, email, calendar, web search, and more via SMS and voice calls.

Lightfriend bridges the gap between minimalist dumbphones and essential digital services. It works with any phone that can make calls and send texts — no apps, no smartphone required.

## How It Works

Users interact with Lightfriend by sending SMS messages or making voice calls to their assigned phone number. The AI assistant processes requests and responds via the same channel.

## Key Features

- **Messaging**: Send and receive WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal messages via SMS
- **Email**: Read and send Gmail/Outlook emails
- **Calendar**: View, create, and get reminders from Google Calendar
- **Web Search**: AI-powered search via Perplexity
- **Directions**: Turn-by-turn navigation via Google Maps
- **Weather**: Forecasts up to 7 days
- **Photo Analysis**: Send photos for translation, QR scanning (MMS countries)
- **Tesla Control**: Lock, unlock, climate control via text
- **Proactive Monitoring**: 24/7 critical message alerts, scheduled digests, priority sender notifications

## Availability

Available in 40+ countries including US, Canada, UK, Finland, Netherlands, Australia, and most of Europe and Asia-Pacific.

## Pricing

Plans start at $9/month (Digest plan) and $29/month (Monitor plan). Pricing varies by country.
